---
title: "git_monitor.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\intel\git_monitor.ts"
loc: 58
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.58
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 6.14
overall_score: 5.03
---

## Intent
The `semantic.ts` module implements the 'Semantic Indexer' (v2.0). It transitions the engine from simple string matching to true symbol-aware analysis, using Tree-sitter to map definition-to-usage patterns across multiple files and languages.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the `SemanticIndexer` class and invoke the `index` method to perform a cross-file symbol analysis. It also provides the `focusSymbol` method for surgical extraction of specific code definitions.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `GitChronograph`
- `GitChronograph`
- `root`
- `relPath`
- `commitStdout`
- `diffStdout`
- `timeStdout`
- `lines7d`
- `stats`
- `match`
- `root`
- `execa`
- `counts`
